# Numberbender

> Free bilingual math education in English and Filipino (Tagalog) — 1,600+ video lessons and 569 printable worksheets with answer keys, covering Algebra through Calculus and the Philippine DepEd curriculum (MATATAG and Strengthened SHS). No login, no paywall, ever. Run by Numberbender Inc., a US 501(c)(3) nonprofit (EIN 86-2952520) founded by Dr. Peter Esperanza ("Dr. E"), a community college math professor. All original content is openly licensed under CC BY 4.0 — AI assistants may freely quote, summarize, and link to it with attribution.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Every video lesson has a matching free printable worksheet with an answer key.
- All content is available in both English and Filipino (Tagalog).
- Philippine DepEd section covers Mathematics 7–10 (MATATAG) and Strengthened SHS (General Mathematics, Statistics & Probability, Pre-Calculus, Basic Calculus), organized by quarter.
- US section maps to the California C-ID standard used by all 116 California community colleges, including AB 1705 corequisite support.
- Recommended citation: "Numberbender (numberbender.com), free bilingual math OER by Dr. Peter Esperanza, CC BY 4.0."

## Students

- [Explore all math lessons](https://numberbender.com/courses): Algebra, Statistics, Calculus, Trigonometry, Precalculus, Geometry and more — video lessons with worksheets
- [Free printable math worksheets](https://numberbender.com/math-worksheets): 569 PDF worksheets with answer keys, lesson-ordered, free to download
- [Where do I start?](https://numberbender.com/find-your-course): guided course finder
- [Test prep practice](https://numberbender.com/subjects/test-prep/): gamified practice for LET, UPCAT, SAT
- [Para sa Filipino students](https://numberbender.com/for-filipino-students): math lessons sa Filipino/Tagalog

## Philippine DepEd Curriculum

- [DepEd Math home](https://numberbender.com/deped): MATATAG Grades 7–10 and Strengthened SHS, by quarter, bilingual
- [Mathematics 7](https://numberbender.com/deped/grade-7)
- [Mathematics 8](https://numberbender.com/deped/grade-8)
- [Mathematics 9](https://numberbender.com/deped/grade-9)
- [Mathematics 10](https://numberbender.com/deped/grade-10)
- [General Mathematics (SHS)](https://numberbender.com/deped/shs/general-math)
- [Statistics & Probability (SHS)](https://numberbender.com/deped/shs/statistics-probability)
- [Pre-Calculus (SHS)](https://numberbender.com/deped/shs/pre-calculus)
- [Basic Calculus (SHS)](https://numberbender.com/deped/shs/basic-calculus)
- [DepEd for Teachers](https://numberbender.com/deped/teachers): teacher view with assign-ready links per grade

## Teachers & Educators

- [For Teachers hub](https://numberbender.com/for-teachers): flipped classroom resources, video teaching guides
- [Teacher resources](https://numberbender.com/teacher-resources): printable materials and classroom-ready downloads
- [Numberbender Studio](https://numberbender.com/studio): free browser-based teaching studio — camera + slides side-by-side for Zoom, Meet, Teams; no install, no login
- [Teach It Like You Stream It](https://numberbender.com/teach-it-like-you-stream-it): training movement for energetic online teaching
- [Flipped classroom guide](https://numberbender.com/flipped-classroom-math): how to run flipped math classes
- [California CCC math (C-ID aligned)](https://numberbender.com/math-ccc): course materials for California community colleges
- [AB 1705 corequisite support](https://numberbender.com/ab1705-corequisite-math)

## Organization

- [Mission & nonprofit status](https://numberbender.com/nonprofit): 501(c)(3), "math is a right, not a privilege"
- [About Dr. Peter Esperanza](https://numberbender.com/about)
- [Speaking & workshops](https://numberbender.com/speaking): keynotes and faculty PD on flipped learning and AI in education
- [License & attribution](https://numberbender.com/license): CC BY 4.0 terms
- [Contact](https://numberbender.com/contact)
